Also fix local bd doctor issues: outdated hooks, missing gitignore patterns, tracked credential key.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"chore","owner":"niksavis@live.com","created_at":"2026-03-23T07:25:43Z","created_by":"Niksa Visic","updated_at":"2026-03-23T07:25:43Z"}
